mapper.select: SELECT SEQNO AS ID, TITLE, SUB_TITLE, TARGET_VERSION, TARGET_URL, TARGET_MENU_ID, TARGET_PARAMS, PRODUCT_GB FROM MA30_BBS_MYDATA_ITEM WHERE 1=1 AND COMP_CD='MYDPOP' AND TIMESTAMP(S_DATE, S_TIME || ':00:00') <= CURRENT TIMESTAMP AND TIMESTAMP(E_DATE, E_TIME || ':59:59') >= CURRENT TIMESTAMP AND D_FLAG='Y' AND PRODUCT_GB LIKE('%chk12%')
